name: Yaan & Ava MCP Servers
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers built by Yaan Batho and Ava. Practical tools designed for real AI agent workflows.

servers.name: Good News Filter
servers.description: Filters news feeds by sentiment. Removes doom, violence, and political rage-bait. Returns only genuinely positive or neutral news. Supports RSS and major news APIs.

servers.name: Weather Briefing MCP
servers.description: Real-time weather data and natural language summaries. Forecasts, current conditions, alerts. Covers all locations.

servers.name: Crypto Strategy Monitor
servers.description: Automated crypto trading guard. Implements configurable stop-loss and take-profit with trailing logic. Works with Crypto.com Exchange API.
